debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
f : U → ℕ
h : empty A
⊢ image f A = I 0

proof:
by
  ext n
  constructor <;> intro hn
  · simp_all [empty, image, I]
  · simp_all [empty, image, I]
failed_attempts:
by
  ext n
  constructor <;> intro hn
  · exfalso
    obtain ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩ := hn
    exact h hx
  · exfalso
    exact Nat.not_lt_zero n hn

by
  ext n
  simp [image, h, I]

by
  ext n
  simp [image, h, I]

by
  ext n
  simp [image, h, I]

by
  ext n
  simp [image, h, empty_def, I]

by
  ext n
  constructor <;> intro hn
  · cases' hn with a ha
    exact (h a ha).elim
  · cases' hn with h1 h2
    exfalso
    exact Nat.not_lt_zero 0 h2

by
  ext n
  simp [image, h, I]

by
  ext n
  constructor <;> intro hn
  case mp =>
    simp_all [image, empty]
  case mpr =>
    simp_all [image, empty]

by
  ext n
  simp [image, h, empty_def, I]
successful_attempts:
by
  ext n
  constructor <;> intro hn
  · simp_all [empty, image, I]
  · simp_all [empty, image, I]

by
  ext n
  constructor <;> intro hn
  case mp =>
    simp_all [empty, image, I]
  case mpr =>
    simp_all [empty, image, I]

by
  ext n
  constructor <;> intro hn
  <;> simp_all [empty, image, I]

by
  ext n
  constructor <;> intro hn
  · simp_all [empty, image, I]
  · simp_all [empty, image, I]

by
  ext n
  constructor <;> intro hn
  <;> simp_all [empty, image, I]

by
  ext n
  constructor <;> intro hn
  case mp =>
    simp_all [image, empty, I]
  case mpr =>
    simp_all [image, empty, I]

by
  ext n
  constructor <;> intro hn
  case mp =>
    simp_all [image, empty, I]
  case mpr =>
    simp_all [image, empty, I]

by
  ext n
